## Key Benefits of Gyeon Glass Plus Cleaner

- Water Repellency - Creates a hydrophobic layer on the surface for superior water beading and runoff
- Enhanced Clarity - Improves visibility by reducing streaks, smears and water spots
- Safe to Use - Suitable for windscreens, side windows and mirrors

- Gyeon Q²M Glass+ Plus
Glass+ Ceramic Glass Cleaner cleans glass, windows and windscreens while leaving ceramic protection.

## Description

Gyeon Q²M Glass+ combines great cleaning power with added repellency properties for maximum clarity and clear vision in all conditions.

Based on the well know Q²M Glass formula, Q²M Glass+ doesn’t disappoint when it comes to ease of use. It will effortlessly remove any dirt & grime while leaving a slick and anti-static glass surface on both interior and exterior glass.

Using Q²M Glass+ during your wash routine will add noticeable slickness to your glass, enhancing your vision in wet conditions even at low speed. It can be used over any existing rain repellent on the car and will act as a great hydrophobic booster.

Best practice and pro-tips from Yves Heylen:**

****

Spray Q²M Glass+ on a short hair microfibre towel rather than directly on the glass. It may be used on Plexi or polycarbonate elements as well as on LCD screens or monitors.

Consumption: 40ml/car

## How to use Gyeon Glass Plus Cleaner

- Ensure your car glass is clean, dry, and free of any dirt, oils, or residues
- Spray a small amount onto the glass or applicator
- Use the applicator to spread the product in a thin, even layer across the entire surface
- Avoid streaks by working in small sections
- Buff off any remaining excess with a clean microfibre cloth
